_comment: Copy this file to secrets/dev-credentials.local.json and fill it in. secrets/ is gitignored. Every test tier (unit needs nothing; integration + live copy + E2E onboarding + AI features + live economic-calendar sources) reads its credentials from this single file. Environment variables still override any value. Legacy split files (openapi-test-app.local.json / openapi-cids.local.json / openapi-tokens.local.json) are still honoured as a fallback when this file is absent.
